game.title: Apocalypse Eats
game.short_text: Zombie Apocalypse "Delivery" Rougelite game

details.title: Apocalypse Eats
details.description:
You're a part-time delivery man, delivering chickens to survivors at a Zombie Apocalypse. 
You don't have a way to attack zombies, but you DO have a chicken with you. throw it to the zombies and it will lure them to other place, so you could clear your delivery more safely. The downside is, you won't be able to earn much money if you don't have much chickens with you.
WASD / Arrow to move
Space to Jump; it will let you pass through obstacles and zombies(smaller ones)
Left Click to throw chicken

game.title: Mister Jack - ScreamJam2024
game.short_text: Horror point and click historical fiction adventure game.

details.title: Mister Jack - ScreamJam2024
details.description:
1# Story at ScreamJam 2024.
WebGL version may take a moment to load and feature some audio bugs. Please play the downloadable version for the best experience.
----------------------------------------------
London, 1888
Sheila Watson, the daughter of the now-retired Dr. John Watson, has inherited her father’s keen mind and investigative skills. After the tragic death of his longtime partner, Sherlock Holmes, Dr. Watson stepped away from detective work. However, Sheila, having studied medicine under her father in secret—since women weren't allowed formal medical education at the time—was also fascinated by the cases of Holmes and Watson. She poured over every file, mastering the art of deduction.

Now, with the gruesome murder of Mary Ann "Polly" Nichols on Friday, August 31st, in Buck's Row, Whitechapel, Sheila realizes it’s time to step out of her father's shadow. She is determined to catch the killer before more innocent lives are taken.

Immerse yourself in a dark, fictional horror story inspired by the infamous real-life events of Jack the Ripper’s reign of terror in Victorian London.

WARNING: Flashing Lights. This game contains graphic depictions of violence, including mutilated corpses. Viewer discretion is advised.

----------------------------------------------
A GAME BY
DuckMadeOfWood // Hankworx // LBRTY
Created for Scream Jam 2024

VOICE CAST
Katie Aitken as Sheila
Dave McClellan as Dr. Watson, Timothy Donovan, and Constable Mizen
Jimmy Dean as Coachman, Mixer, and John Davis
Maya Murphy on vocals and as Mary Kelly
Brogan Farr as Emily Holland
Chris Bain as Drunken Patron
Cody Briggs as The Butcher
----------------------------------------------
Historical Information
Sheila Watson, The Mixer and the Drunken patron are fictional characters invented for the game.
Dr. Watson is a character created by Sir Arthur Conan Doyle.
All the other characters portrayed in the game are based on historical figures related to the murders of Jack The Ripper.
The depiction of the body of Annie Chapman has been created following the description of the autopsy from the newspapers of the time. 
Sources and inspirations:
In the footsteps of Jack the Ripper by J.P.Sperati
From Hell by Alan Moore & Eddie Campbell

----------------------------------------------
HINTS (Spoilers):
Part one: Ask questions to find out where to find an eyewitness.
Part two: Find all the clues on the body and the courtyard.
Part three: Listen carefully and look for clues to find your way.
Part four: Quickly find objects around you to fight back.

moreInfo.Authors: Duck Made Of Wood, LBRTY, hankworx
moreInfo.Tags: Atmospheric, Horror, jack-the-ripper, LGBT, Mystery, No AI, Pixel Art, Point & Click, Violent

game.title: The Dollhouse
game.short_text: first-person psychological horror experience

details.title: The Dollhouse
details.description:
Once upon a time... a protocol was initiated.
  
The Dollhouse
 Genre: Psychological Horror Controls: Point-and-click or touch Gameplay Duration: ~6 minutes 
You are on an important mission inside a strange house known as The Dollhouse. Guided by radio communication, your task is to follow a strict protocol in order to uncover a secret algorithm hidden within an old fairytale.
  
⚠️ Warning
This game contains flashing lights and images that may not be suitable for individuals with photosensitive epilepsy.
  
Story by Joonas Ennala

game.title: Fire on the Mountain
game.short_text: Can you out-fiddle the devil? (and others...)

details.title: Fire on the Mountain
details.description:
If you'd care to take a dare, I'll make a bet with you...
Walk in the footsteps of a legend and challenge the devil to a musical duel. The prize: a fiddle made of solid gold. 
Enjoy lively fiddle music, challenging rhythm gameplay, and a story about hubris.
Do you have what it takes?
Controls
Press any button to progress through the dialogue.
Press the A and D keys (or the Left and Right Arrows) to pull your bow in time to the notes to out-fiddle your opponent and earn the highest score.
Press the Spacebar to Start or Pause the song.
Known Issues
Clicking with a mouse or clicking too quickly through dialogue will skip multiple dialogues.
Credits

game.title: Whale Bones
game.short_text: A little game about tanker wreck

details.title: Whale Bones
details.description:
Whale Bones is a short atmospheric horror game where you play as a junior staff member of a large company, Hollow Horizon. You are sent to a small deserted island where a tanker has suffered a wreck. Your task is simple: fill out some documents and wait for the special forces team to handle the aftermath. It would be a routine business trip - if not for the unsettling discoveries you make while completing your assignment.
The game lasts approximately 15 minutes.


This game was made for the SCREAM JAM 2024


May contain flashes and flickers!

W, A, S, D - Movement
SPACE - Jump 

ESC - PauseE - InteractT - Skip dialogue

game.title: Voice Of The Valley
game.short_text: Suspenseful Horror Game

details.title: Voice Of The Valley
details.description:
Knox, an FBI agent, is tasked with investigating a series of missing persons reports. When she travels to Arizona to follow a lead, it takes her and her partner to a Native American reservation located in a remote part of the desert, deep within a valley, but upon arrival she quickly realizes something is awry. The town is abandoned, without a soul in sight. In this adventure game, play as Agent Knox and unravel the mystery of the valley. 
Voice of the Valley is a short, suspenseful, horror game developed by a team of 8 people for Scream Jam 2024.

game.title: TriumAI
game.short_text: The AI core has gone rogue. Shut it down.

details.title: TriumAI
details.description:
TriumAI is a first-person horror game featuring a unique puzzle system built around commands.
Story: Following an outbreak of rogue Core incidents, Humanity is on the brink of outlawing all future AI development. However, just weeks before the regulations are introduced, reports are received that the world's most advanced AI core is no longer under our control. You play as a tech specialist for an elite taskforce, who has been assigned to shut down the Core. You must make your way to the top of the megatower, ready to face whatever defences it has prepared against you.
Credits: Game Developed by: Ben Armitage Story Written by: Scott Bowsher
Made in 7 days for Scream Jam 2024!

resultData.title: If it get's too scary, press F

game.title: If it get's too scary, press F
game.short_text: You found a cool gameboy advance cartridge for an obscure maze game. Maybe it's good?

details.title: If it get's too scary, press F
details.description:
A game made by TheMagnat, Bul0z, ObaniGarage and Kryspou for the ScreamJam2024.

This is our first ever horror game.

It's a Godot Engine game, so it might be flagged by your antivirus. If you have a doubt about something, you can check our sources here

If you happen to get lost but you want to finish the game anyway, here are the main goals of the game :
WARNING - SPOILER AHEAD !
Find the dagger (This should be easy by just running around at the start)Find the torch (Following ofther torches on the wall may guide you) then get throught the dark passage (which you may have seen comming from the dagger room)Find the last item (Follow the blue torches)
(I won't tell what it is and what it does to keep the surprise, but what it allow you to do from now on should be clear)
And to find the end, you have to get back to the start and find the exit. (If you get lost too much, listen to the sounds, you may hear something new that could guide you to the end)
One last surprise await you at the end !

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 3.0 out of 5 stars(2 total ratings)
moreInfo.Tags: Dungeon Crawler, Horror, maze

game.title: Escape Mansion
game.short_text: You awaken is a mysterious mansion, your only goal is to escape

details.title: Escape Mansion
details.description:
Whispers of the old mansion in the hills have passed through generations. No one knows who—or what—dwells within its shadowy halls. No one has ever been seen entering or leaving. Shrouded in mystery, the mansion hides countless secrets.
You awaken inside, your mind a blank slate. No memories. No past. Just an overwhelming sense that this place wants to claim you. The only thing you know for certain: you need to escape.

moreInfo.Author: Thiago L.
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, 8-Bit, Fast-Paced, Horror, Top-Down

game.title: Rotting Railway: Endless
game.short_text: New Endless Mode! How long can you survive?

details.title: Rotting Railway: Endless
details.description:
If you enjoyed this game, you'd love my newest game Coagulation Station: Fleshfall! You can wishlist it on steam here:The year is 1918. A new chemical weapon has been unleashed that doesn't just kill soldiers, it reanimates them. Now only one chance remains to return the world back to the way it used to be...

Rotting Railway is an on-rails arcade shooter where you operate the world's most powerful armored train. Your goal is to punch through the zombie-infested No-Man's-Land of World War 1, destroying everything that stands in your way.
Version 0.0.5 is now available! This is the biggest update yet with a new game mode, multiple new trains to unlock and play as, dozens of new levels and encounters, new weather effects, many new structures to destroy, new weapons to wield, new visual effects, balance changes and more!
~~Features~~
NEW: Unlockable Endless Mode.NEW: Unlockable Train Loadouts with varied weapons.Short, highly replayable action packed arcade experience.Randomized levels to make every run a different experience.Dozens of fully destructible objects, buildings and vehicles.Detailed effects designed to fully immerse you in the destruction.Dozens of varied enemy encounters.A fully 'fleshed' out Boss Battle.Unique soundtrack tailored to match the BPM of the train's steam engine.Partial Gamepad compatibility.Multitude of collectable powerups and upgrades that allow for multiple different playstyles.A BIG train with BIG guns.More features planned for the future!

I have a lot planned for Rotting Railway, so if you would like to keep seeing updates for this game, be sure to leave a rating, let me know what you think about it in the comments and spread the word to your friends! It helps a lot!
Controls:
Mouse/Right Stick: AimingLMB/Right Trigger: Fire WeaponRMB/Left Trigger: Zoom InMMB/Press Right Stick In: Toggle 3rd Person ModeSpacebar/Right Bumper: Use Active ItemEscape/Pause button: Pause Game

For any content creators looking to do videos on Rotting Railway, there is a press kit available. It includes 30 images for you to use in your thumbnails! I tried to make each as awesome as I could. If you do a video, feel free to post it in the comments. I would love to see it!Also try my other wholesome game, Mr. Frog's Winter Adventure! https://thebigonioninstitute.itch.io/mr-frogs-winter-adventure

And, as a thank you to everyone who has graciously donated, I have now made a special supporter pack available! It contains the soundtrack, behind-the-scenes images as well as special developer insights on the development of the game and snippets of the real history of the Great War!

moreInfo.Rating: Rated 4.9 out of 5 stars(75 total ratings)
moreInfo.Author: TheBigOnionInstitute
moreInfo.Tags: Halloween, Horror, Indie, PSX (PlayStation), Roguelite, scream-jam, Short, Trains

game.title: Glitter
game.short_text: Some people can never let go...no matter the cost.

details.title: Glitter
details.description:
Story:
In this Gothic horror haunted mansion themed visual novel, you play as Ember, who receives an invitation from her friend, Aurelia, to visit her suburban mansion. Legend says that Aurelia’s family once possessed a collection of worlds within the mansion that can grant any wish. Drawn by the hope of having her deepest wish fulfilled, Ember ventures to Glitterwood mansion. Will Ember find what she’s looking for, or will the cost of her wish be too great? Every wish comes with a sacrifice.
  


Features:
    
A Gothic horror visual novel exploring themes of loss, love, and the struggle of letting go.
   8.5K words & 3 different endings.Over 20 in-game art and CGs Approximately one hour of gameplay, depending on reading speed. Made within one week for ScreamJam 2024 to celebrate Halloween.

Content Warning: 
  
Contains: Blood, murder, character death, ritual sacrifice, and very vaguely mentioned domestic violence and abuse. 
  This work is entirely a work of fiction. The names, characters and incidents portrayed in it are the work of the author’s imagination. Any resemblance to actual persons, living or dead, events, or localities is entirely coincidental.
  By downloading and playing this game, you acknowledge that the characters' views and opinions are purely fictional and do not represent those of the author. 
  If you are unable to distinguish between fiction and reality, please kindly refrain yourself  from playing this game. Thank you for your understanding.
  


 Credits:
Story, code, and art & UI by MidnightElipsy. 
  
Edited by Diana J
Assets Used (BGM and sfx): 
Moonlit night by Calvinclavier on Pixabay 
Horror music Ambience11  & Tense Atmosphere & Deeply emotional melodies  by Universfield on Pixabay 
Happy Halloween everyone!
    

CAST 
Sophie Nyx as Ember https://itch.io/profile/sophienyx
Alice as Aurelia
Atypical Alex as Julien  https://atypicalalex.itch.io/

resultData.title: What Lives in the Woods. - Scream Jam 2024

game.title: What Lives in the Woods. - Scream Jam 2024
game.short_text: A birder ventures into an unusual woods.

details.title: What Lives in the Woods. - Scream Jam 2024
details.description:
Created in 7 days for Scream Jam 2024.
In the comfort of civilization,  we often forget what lives in the woods. Once exposed bare to nature, you find yourself confused and helpless.
You enter an unassuming trail to take photos of the birds, but you soon realize there might be something more.
Lost in the woods, there's not much you can do but hope that you survive, or take photos. Maybe your logs will be eventually discovered by people.

How to Play
All the controls are done with the mouse.Stick to the trail! Click on trail markers to progress.Click to get into camera view.Move the mouse around until camera is in the right frame to take photo.Click to hide if you ever feel the need to. Be careful. Not all areas have bushes that are suitable for hiding.If your OS will not open the application:
PC:Option 1:
Option 2:Context-click(right-click) on the downloaded .exe file.Click on Properties and go to General tab if not already there.Look for a message at the bottom that says:This file came from another computer and might be blocked to help protect this computer.Check the Unblock checkbox and try running the .exe file again.
MacOS:Either open System Preferences, click Security & Privacy, then click General, and click Open Anyway.Or, right-click (Control-click) on the app icon in the Finder window and select Open from the menu.Instructions with screenshot can be found here: https://docs.godotengine.org/en/stable/tutorials/export/running_on_macos.html#ap...

game.title: The Path
game.short_text: Shed they mortal attachments. Look to the path.

details.title: The Path
details.description:
Controls:
Move forward / backW/S or arrow keys
Interact with characters in doorways/ altarsEnter or SpacebarAccept TradeEnter or SpacebarCancel TradeEsc
You have no past. There is only the Path. 
A spyglass and a sextant are the only tokens of a faint memory of the sea and the stars. Only one thing is clear: the way ahead. 
Trade with the denizens of the Path to gather the offerings and continue.
Credits:
LeafMotif: Programming, 3D Art, Game Design
Shinbone: 2D Art
External Sources
Several low poly models by quaternius (CC0): https://quaternius.com/packs/ultimatemodularcharacters.html
Notes
Regretfully, I ran out of time to add audio or a lot of the aesthetic polish I was hoping to get to this jam -- but I still feel good about some of the puzzle ideas explored here!For the second puzzle, it took me like 8 hours just to design a meaningful solution. The spookiest thing about this jam was the creeping fear that I had committed to puzzle mechanics that were intrinsically unsolvable. Six iterations and several exasperated sighs later, I found a tricky solution that (i think) avoids soft-locking players into an unwinnable condition. It might be too hard....

game.title: Dead Men Sell No Ales
game.short_text: Cook up disturbing dishes for creepy crewmates.

details.title: Dead Men Sell No Ales
details.description:
Made in 1 week for Scream Jam 2024 from Oct 16 - Oct 23 2024.

While working in the cargo ship's kitchen, you move with practiced ease until a sudden, jarring crash shatters your routine. Confusion and concern grip you as shadowy figures with obscured faces burst in, seizing you and yanking you away from the stove. They blindfold you and transfer you to a smaller boat. When the blindfold is removed, you find yourself aboard a colossal, eerie ship with ancient, tattered sails and wood worn by more than just time. Strange symbols adorn its sides, twisting and shifting when glanced at directly.
Surrounded by beings that defy description—shadowy forms with eyes glinting unnaturally—you witness another chef being dragged from a small galley. His incoherent pleas turn to screams as he's thrown overboard, disappearing into the dark waters below. An eerie chorus of chewing sounds rises from the depths, swallowing his final screams.
Horror washes over you as you step back, realizing you're trapped on this nightmarish vessel with entities beyond your understanding. As their unreadable gazes lock onto you, a single, consuming thought fills your mind: What do they want from me?
Credits
Developer - Sprout
Artists - ProfessionalD & Galaxus
Game Designer - ERROR
Composer - RoryButlerMusic 
Other Assets Used
Sky Backgrounds
GUI Elements

注：网页版暂不支持中文，请下载SHEPHERD牧羊人2.5 WIN.zip到本地游玩。Field Team A513-2, codename “Shepherd”, has been task to retrieve data from a closed military laboratory. It is supposed to be an easy job for Jody, Nova, and Cooper, but abnormalities begins to appear as they venture deeper into the facility. Separated teammates, inconsistent clock readings, disagreement over the order of events, etc.
 As the handler of the team, should Jody call the team back as a precaution or fulfill their duty of figuring out what’s going on? Is everything just equipment malfunctioning or is there something bizarre going on? Who is the real Shepherd and who is being herded?
· · ·
Shepherd is a first-person simulator puzzle game where you play as Jody Sima, the handler of a special task group codenamed “Shepherd”. Using a combination of radio conversation, live-positioning map, photo receiver, and a field manual, you will guide your teammates through a series of seemingly bizarre events and simulations, unveil the secrets of the facility, and (try to) bring everyone safely back home.

game.title: Hello, connect me with...
game.short_text: November 21st, 1946, Spain. It is your first day as a telephone operator: receive calls, connect them, listen.

details.title: Hello, connect me with...
details.description:
"The sorrowful autumn is nearing its end. You feel proud; you have secured a position as a telephone operator at a prestigious company. Today is your first day.
You adjust your coat, step outside, and make your way through the somber streets of your hometown, Tomillar del Alba —the place where you were born— towards your new workplace. You arrive at an imposing building, its summit difficult to discern due to the foggy atmosphere of the day. As you enter the structure, you sense an ominous yet friendly ambiance. You cross a bustling reception area; however, despite the crowd, it feels devoid of life: individuals who resemble nothing more than shells emitting sounds, moving about and swaying… perhaps it is the early hour that necessitates their attendance at work.
Next, you reach the staircase, your feet feeling as heavy as if they were anvils. Each step seems more exhausting than the last, but you finally arrive at your floor. A few colleagues greet you with gestures that are both kind and insincere, directing you to your work station, with your chair and telephone switchboard. You prepare to take a seat." 
Hello, connect me with... is an immersive game that simulates the work of early telephone operators: receive calls, act as an interpreter, connect them, listen and uncover the story hidden within the streets of Tomillar del Alba, the fictional village in which is set, during the early years of Spain under Franco.

Controls: to play the game you will need a mouse and a keypad. Events are selected through clicks. You will need the keypad to write notes inside the game.

------------------------------------------------

«El pesaroso otoño está próximo a finalizar. Estás orgullosa, has conseguido empleo como telefonista en una empresa de renombre. Empiezas hoy.
Te acomodas el abrigo, sales de casa, te diriges a través de las apesadumbradas calles de tu pueblo, Tomillar del Alba — el pueblo que te vio nacer—, hacia tu nuevo puesto. Llegas a un imponente edificio, cuya cumbrera es difícil de discernir por el ambiente neblinoso del día de hoy. Te adentras en la construcción: te sumerges en su ambiente ominoso pero afable. Cruzas un ajetreado recibidor, pero por más lleno que esté lo sientes sin vida: personas que más que seres racionales parecen cascarones que emiten sonidos, se desplazan y se tambalean… quizá sea por la temprana hora a la que se ha de acudir al laburo. A continuación, llegas a la escalera, te pesan los pies igual que si de yunques se trataran. Cada escalón se te hace más cansino que el anterior, pero llegas a tu planta. Unas compañeras te reciben, con gestos amables a la par que falsos, y te indican dónde se halla tu puesto, con tu silla y tu centralita. Te dispones a sentarte».

Hello, connect me with… es un juego inmersivo en el que se simula un trabajo de las antiguas telefonistas: recibe llamadas, haz de intérprete, conéctalas, escucha y descubre la historia que se esconde entre las calles de Tomillar del Alba, el pueblo ficticio en el que se ambienta, durante la España del primer franquismo. 


Controles: para jugar al juego se necesita ratón y teclado. Por medio del clic se accionan los eventos. El teclado se necesita para escribir anotaciones dentro del juego.

Alcanciles con miopía:
    
Andrés García Navarro
    
Ariadna (Ari) Ruiz Castillo
    
Cynthia (Cyntrist) Tristán Álvarez
    
    
Carmen Gómez Becerra
    
Nieves Alonso Gilsanz

- Created for the 2024 Scream Jam -

moreInfo.Authors: leves, admuf, Andrga, ariadnaki, Cynthia Tristán, Alcanciles Con Miopia
moreInfo.Tags: Atmospheric, Dark, Experimental, Female Protagonist, Hand-drawn, Historical, Horror, Narrative, Short, Singleplayer

details.title: Lord Of The Vail
details.description:
Note: From the developer, I highly recommend playing the game with the World of Horror soundtrack in the background. 

You move around with (A) and (D) or click the sides.
(A to move left) and (D to move right).
Press (Tab) to toggle the inventory. ( or Click Equip Button)
Press Escape to go Fullscreen.
Click anywhere to fast forward the text.

You interact with things by clicking on them. If you're lucky, you'll find an item.
There are two types of items: passives/perks and tools, perks work passivly but tools need to be equipped to work.
For example, in the office with the TV and lamp, click on the dark brown jacket.
When you find an item, drag it into the active slot (E) to equip it. Once an item is equipped, you can use it. You use it by clicking on whatever you want to interact with. Click around, and you should find something special in the main office.
You’ve probably noticed the TV. You can buy stuff through the TV menu. Buying items will cost you funds, of course.
And last thing, the skill stat governs your chances of succeeding in an event.

You will lose the game if--
your police/HP number reaches zero,
your corruption stat is increased to 5 or above, 
Or an intruder enters your office. They have a chance to appear with each report (They appear with a audio cue). So, when you hear an odd noise, i might be time to check the window. Remember, you’re not safe—even while doing paperwork.
A GAME BY

Me - Matte0802
Created for Scream Jam 2024


You work as a police chief investigating reports and doing paperwork while at the same time trying to survive the cursed town of New Britannia. The game takes heavy inspiration from the gameplay aspects of World of Horror, with some quirks like an inventory system,  a point and click system and upgrade mechanics. From a world-building and visual perspective, it draws inspiration from movies like Se7en.
Heavily inspired by World of Horror and films like Se7en, the game includes:

Four different endings.
Ten different events with branching paths.
Multiple choices with various endings for each investigation.

The entire game was completed in just under a week by myself. I'm quite happy with it if you look past its visuals. Trying to replicate a movie like Se7en, which uses a lot of brown and green tones, while also making it visually appealing felt nearly impossible. The game was also a victim of scope creep with the inventory system, choices, and so on. Anyway, I'm just thankful I actually finished this time, lol. Thanks a lot for looking a my game!

moreInfo.Author: matte0802
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Atmospheric, Halloween, Horror, Ludum Dare 56, Pixel Art, Point & Click, Retro, Singleplayer

game.title: Old News
game.short_text: Investigate the tapping | Created in 7 days for Scream Jam 2024

details.title: Old News
details.description:
Created in 7 Days for the Scream Jam 2024

DESCRIPTION
Old News is a narratively driven, point and click, horror game where you take on the role of an old confused man as he tries to get to the bottom of a mysterious tapping.   The Game is very simple and should be completable in a couple of minutes. I hope you enjoy it; I was hoping to get a few more sound effects and polish into the game before the deadline but that's game jams for you.

CONTROLS
Use A and D to move left and right. The mouse can be used to interact with some objects in the world when close enough.

Known Issues

Play in pop out window to evade viewport issues
Typo on basement door error message. Sound say "Brass" not "Rass"
Sound is there but is quiet. Audio mixing is not my strong suit
